Operation 'lookupBulkIps' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate, but description lacks important details about output format and structure. AI agents need to understand that the response is an array of geolocation objects corresponding to each input IP. Added clarification about input format (comma-separated IPv4/IPv6), output structure (array of geolocation responses), and order preservation to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand how to process bulk results.
